text:
cbb0: <PCI-CardBus Bridge> mem 0xc020a000-0xc020afff at device 9.0 on pci5
cardbus1: <CardBus bus> on cbb0
pccard1: <16-bit PCCard bus> on cbb0
cbb: Unable to map IRQ...
device_attach: cbb0 attach returned 12

as of the last full builld/install world + new kernel pcmcia sokets and
card bus sockets fail. with the above error.

How-To-Repeat: I booted with a live Desktopbsd cdrom and the cardbus/pcmcia socket works
fine. I reboot into the hard drive and it again fails.
